name: United Bank
description_short: United Bank is a full-service bank offering personal banking, business banking, investments, and wealth management services since 1839, with online and branch access.
description_long:
United Bank was founded on St. Patrick's Day in 1839 and has operated for 187 years as a traditional banking institution. The company emphasizes its long history of "safe, sound, and secure banking" and claims to have earned community trust over nearly two centuries of operation. United Bank is part of United Bankshares, Inc., a publicly traded holding company.

United Bank offers a comprehensive range of financial services across multiple business lines: personal banking products (checking, savings accounts, credit cards, and loans), small business and commercial banking services, wealth management and investment advisory services, and brokerage services through United Brokerage Services, Inc. (a registered broker-dealer subsidiary). The bank provides online banking (eBanking), mobile access, and physical branch locations. Customers can also access investment products, retirement planning tools, and various loan products including mortgages and personal loans.

The company distinguishes itself primarily through its historical longevity and community presence. United Bank emphasizes consumer financial education, offering content on topics like pet ownership costs, AI-assisted savings, retirement planning, and financial scam protection. The bank maintains 24/7 technical support for online banking and specialized support lines for debit cards and credit cards. Their website highlights security and fraud prevention education, actively warning customers about scam tactics and how the bank will never request sensitive information via unsolicited communications.

As a traditional brick-and-mortar bank with over 180 years of history, United Bank is a mainstream financial institution suitable for customers seeking established banking relationships. However, the website provides limited information about specific product rates, fees, or competitive advantages. The company's investment products explicitly carry disclaimers that they are not FDIC-insured and may lose value, which is standard but important for potential investors to understand. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Small business banking and commercial banking services
Brokerage services through United Brokerage Services, Inc.
Investment products and retirement planning tools
Debit card services with 24/7 lost or stolen card support
Financial education and planning resources (savings planner, budgeting templates)
pros: FDIC-insured deposit accounts backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
187-year operating history since 1839 demonstrates long-term stability and community trust
24/7 eBanking technical support and dedicated support lines for debit cards (800.724.3259) and credit cards (800.242.7600)
Comprehensive product suite including personal banking, business banking, wealth management, and brokerage services
Online banking (eBanking) enrollment available with privacy policy protection
Extended customer care hours (Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 9am-5pm) plus financial education resources
Active fraud prevention education and clear communication about security protocols
cons: Website does not display specific product rates, APRs, or fee schedules for comparison
Limited information about geographic service area or number of branch locations on main website
Investment and brokerage products carry explicit disclaimers of no FDIC protection and possible loss of principal
Website enrollment link for eBanking appears to have technical issues ("application not available" error)
No information about minimum balance requirements, eligibility criteria, or specific loan terms
best_for: Consumers seeking a large, established bank with 180+ years of operating history and local branch access
Business owners needing comprehensive commercial banking and business services alongside personal accounts
Investors interested in brokerage services and wealth management through a traditional banking institution
diagnosis: United Bank is best for customers who prioritize banking relationships with established, large institutions and want access to comprehensive financial services (banking, investments, wealth management) through a single provider with local branch availability. The primary caveat is that the public-facing website lacks specific pricing, rate, and fee information needed to evaluate competitive positioning, and potential customers should contact the bank directly or visit a branch for detailed product terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: United Bank offers personal banking, business banking, investments, and wealth management since 1839 with online and branch access.
